Examples.Title: Auth:Jwt.Login
Examples.Code:
### Auth:Jwt.Login
# @name auth_jwt_login_api_v1_auth_jwt_login_post
POST {{host}}/api/v1/auth/jwt/login
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Callback
Examples.Description: The response varies based on the authentication backend used.
Examples.Code:
using var client = new PresentonClient(apiKey);
var response = await client.Auth.CallbackApiV1AuthGoogleCallbackGetAsync();
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Presenton;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Register:Register
Examples.Code:
### Register:Register
# @name register_register_api_v1_auth_register_post
POST {{host}}/api/v1/auth/register
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "email": "user@example.com",
  "password": "string",
  "is_active": true,
  "is_superuser": false,
  "is_verified": false,
  "name": "string",
  "enterprise": "string"
}

## Responses
# 201
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Reset:Reset Password
Examples.Code:
### Reset:Reset Password
# @name reset_reset_password_api_v1_auth_reset_password_post
POST {{host}}/api/v1/auth/reset-password
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "token": "string",
  "password": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Users:Patch Current User
Examples.Code:
### Users:Patch Current User
# @name users_patch_current_user_api_v1_auth_users_me_patch
PATCH {{host}}/api/v1/auth/users/me
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Missing token or inactive user.
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Users:Patch User
Examples.Code:
### Users:Patch User
# @name users_patch_user_api_v1_auth_users__id__patch
PATCH {{host}}/api/v1/auth/users/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 401
# Description: Missing token or inactive user.
# 403
# Description: Not a superuser.
# 404
# Description: The user does not exist.
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Verify:Verify
Examples.Code:
### Verify:Verify
# @name verify_verify_api_v1_auth_verify_post
POST {{host}}/api/v1/auth/verify
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "token": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successful Response
# Content-Type: application/json
# 400
# Description: Bad Request
# Content-Type: application/json
# 422
# Description: Validation Error
# Content-Type: application/json
